title: Collibra DataAsset
description: A Collibra DataAsset definition: a business data asset described by entities and their attributes. Vendored as the input shape for the OSI editor's one-way DataAsset -> ontology conversion.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the DataAsset schema this document conforms to (e.g. 3.0.1).

identifier.description: Stable identifier (e.g. UUID) of the DataAsset.

dataOwner.description: Owner of the DataAsset (person, team, or email).

originApplication.description: System or application the DataAsset originates from.

responsibilities.description: Stewardship/responsibility assignments, keyed by responsibility type (e.g. dataManagementExpert) to a list of parties.

tags.description: Free-form tags applied to the DataAsset.

entities.description: Map of entity key -> entity definition.

classification.description: Data classification. An object in DataAsset 3.x (e.g. securityClassification + containsPersonallyIdentifiableInformation); may be a plain string in simpler assets.

attributes.description: Map of attribute key -> attribute definition.

example.description: Example value for the attribute. May be a string, number, boolean, or date.
